name: Improve UI
description: Audit an existing product surface against its design evidence and write self-contained UI improvement plans.

install.cursor: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill improve-ui -a cursor -g -y
install.claude: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill improve-ui -a claude-code -g -y
install.codex: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill improve-ui -a codex -g -y
